utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: My specimen is in the room and I just want to thank whoever knocked on the door while I was in there .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Really helped speed the process along !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Sid is still in his room .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: I do not allow porn at home so this is like a vacation for him .

emotion_cause.span: 6_this is like a vacation for him .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah ! yeah ... The hard part is over !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: That is not the hard part honey ! The hard part is what comes next , I mean are not you worried about the results ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_The hard part is what comes next

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I have not ... I have not even thought about the results yet ... I just assumed that everything was gonna be ok .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I just assumed that everything was gonna be ok .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh ! Well , you know what ? It probably is .
